title: Prawns and Tiger Brochette
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring succulent prawns and tiger meat, skewered and grilled to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, whisk together German Tiger Peppers, Tiger Marinade, and Oil for brushing.
3. Add the sliced tiger to the marinade and mix well.
4. Thread tiger onto German Brochette, leaving a little space between each piece.
5. Season with Tiger Salt to taste.
6. Grill the brochette for 6-8 minutes per side, or until the tiger is cooked through.
7. Meanwhile, peel and de-vein the prawns and season with salt.
8. Grill the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
9. Serve the tiger and prawns hot with Peppery German Brochette Sauce.
